## Engineering Workflow
### Local development
- Use `task run-query-engine-backend-dev`
- Use `task test`

## Dependency Guide
### Runtime libraries
- `fastapi`
- `sqlalchemy`

## Business Logic Domain
### Core responsibilities
- Manage repository analysis workflows
- Produce structured documentation outputs

## App Interfaces
### HTTP surface
- FastAPI endpoints under `api/v1/endpoints`
- Markdown PR endpoints for AGENTS.md updates
